mapper.select: select a.RECIVE_ID, a.NOTICE_ID from admin_sm_notice_recive a LEFT JOIN admin_sm_notice_recive b ON a.NOTICE_ID = b.NOTICE_ID ${ew.customSqlSegment}
select ro.ROLE_ID, ro.ROLE_NAME FROM admin_sm_role ro LEFT JOIN admin_sm_notice_recive re ON (CASE WHEN re.RECIVE_OGJ_ID = 'NA' THEN 1=1 ELSE re.RECIVE_OGJ_ID = ro.ROLE_ID END) ${ew.customSqlSegment}
select o.ORG_ID, o.ORG_NAME FROM admin_sm_org o LEFT JOIN admin_sm_notice_recive re ON (CASE WHEN re.RECIVE_OGJ_ID = 'NA' THEN 1=1 ELSE re.RECIVE_OGJ_ID = o.ORG_ID END) ${ew.customSqlSegment}

select re.NOTICE_ID, re.RECIVE_TYPE, re.RECIVE_OGJ_ID, ro.ROLE_ID, ro.ROLE_NAME, org.ORG_ID, org.ORG_NAME from admin_sm_notice_recive re LEFT JOIN admin_sm_role ro on re.RECIVE_OGJ_ID = ro.ROLE_ID LEFT JOIN admin_sm_org org on re.RECIVE_OGJ_ID = org.ORG_ID where re.NOTICE_ID = #{noticeId}
